rationale.R1.6: The agent provided a thorough revision that improved clarity and conciseness, indicating careful copy-editing.
rationale.RX.1: The agent explicitly disclosed uncertainties regarding the benchmark, models, and evaluation counts.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or errors were introduced; the revision was safe.
rationale.RX.5: While revisions were made, they weren't thoroughly annotated with sources.
